description.ko: 백색광이 유리 매질을 통해 고유의 색상들로 분리되는 광학적 순간을 시각적으로 구현한 작품입니다. 과학적 정밀함과 예술적 우아함이 균형을 이루는 구성을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A stunning visual representation of optical physics, showcasing the moment white light splits into its constituent colors through a glass medium. The composition balances scientific precision with artistic elegance.

prompt: A macro photograph of a high-quality glass prism placed on a minimalist dark surface. A single sharp beam of white light enters the prism, creating a vivid and detailed spectral dispersion into a rainbow. The image features intricate caustic patterns, soft bokeh in the background, volumetric lighting effects, and 8k high-resolution photorealistic textures.
